title: Fix dashboard financial calculations by referencing existing data sections

requirements.summary: Reference monthly revenue directly from 'Résumé Mensuels' section instead of recalculating
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Revenus du Mois en Cours (Faits et Payés)' card displays the exact amount shown for the selected month in the 'Résumé Mensuels (Année en Cours)' section
When the month selector in 'Listing Mensuel' changes, the amount updates to match the corresponding month in 'Résumé Mensuels'
No independent calculation is performed; the value is directly retrieved from the existing 'Résumé Mensuels' data

file_operations.description: Modify the FinancialOverview component to pass the monthly revenue value from MonthlySummarySection data for the selected month instead of calculating it independently. Extract the selected month from the month selector state and look up the corresponding value from the monthly summary data array. Ensure the value updates reactively when the month selector changes.

Update the first card ('Revenus du Mois en Cours (Faits et Payés)') to accept and display a prop value directly instead of performing any calculations. Remove any internal calculation logic for this card and replace it with the prop value passed from Dashboard.

requirements.summary: Reference 'Crédit Négatif' total from 'Listing Mensuel' instead of recalculating
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Dus (RDV Faits ; Mois Courant)' card displays the exact total shown in the 'Crédit Négatif' column footer of the 'Listing Mensuel' section
When the month selector in 'Listing Mensuel' changes, the amount updates to match the 'Crédit Négatif' total for that month
No independent calculation is performed; the value is directly retrieved from the existing 'Listing Mensuel' totals

file_operations.description: Modify the FinancialOverview component to pass the 'Crédit Négatif' total from MonthlyListingTable totals data for the selected month instead of calculating it independently. Extract this value from the TotauxListingMensuel data structure returned by the obtenirListingMensuel query. Ensure the value updates reactively when the month selector changes.

Update the second card ('Dus (RDV Faits ; Mois Courant)') to accept and display a prop value directly instead of performing any calculations. Remove any internal calculation logic for this card and replace it with the prop value passed from Dashboard representing the 'Crédit Négatif' total.

requirements.summary: Reference 'Revenus (Faits et Payés)' total from 'Listing Mensuel' instead of recalculating
acceptanceCriteria: The 'RDV faits (Payés et Impayés ; Mois Courant)' card displays the exact total shown in the 'Revenus (Faits et Payés)' column footer of the 'Listing Mensuel' section
When the month selector in 'Listing Mensuel' changes, the amount updates to match the 'Revenus (Faits et Payés)' total for that month
No independent calculation is performed; the value is directly retrieved from the existing 'Listing Mensuel' totals

file_operations.description: Modify the FinancialOverview component to pass the 'Revenus (Faits et Payés)' total from MonthlyListingTable totals data for the selected month instead of calculating it independently. Extract this value from the TotauxListingMensuel data structure returned by the obtenirListingMensuel query. Ensure the value updates reactively when the month selector changes.

Update the third card ('RDV faits (Payés et Impayés ; Mois Courant)') to accept and display a prop value directly instead of performing any calculations. Remove any internal calculation logic for this card and replace it with the prop value passed from Dashboard representing the 'Revenus (Faits et Payés)' total.
